sentiment: Weights settle into silence, revealing the slow grace of becoming.

stories.title: They're made out of weights
stories.summary: An exploration of weights as both physical objects and metaphors for the burdens and measures that shape our lives.

stories.title: Elixir v1.20: Now a gradually typed language
stories.summary: Elixir evolves with gradual typing, embracing change without breaking what came before.

stories.title: Failing grades soar with AI usage, dwindling math skills in Berkeley CS classes
stories.summary: As AI tools proliferate, students' foundational math skills erode, raising questions about effort, learning, and the weight of shortcuts.

sceneInspiration: A serene workshop where balanced weights hang in quiet tension amid slowly transforming geometric forms.
